translated: When the man who had been healed saw that Jesus was the one who had cured him, he went and told the people, "It is Jesus who made me well."

ref: Peter began to curse and swear, “I don't know that man!” Right then a rooster crowed,

translated: Then Peter said, "Don't ever say that! God forbid that such a thing should ever happen to you!" He turned, and scolded him.

ref: After King Herod died, an angel from the Lord appeared in a dream to Joseph while he was still in Egypt.

translated: When Herod died, an angel of the Lord appeared in a dream to Joseph in Egypt.

translated: Why are you sitting down like that? I thought you were going to the farm. The sun is already high in the sky.

translated: I am very happy today! How did you all manage to come together to visit me like this? Truly, this year has been very difficult for everyone.
